# Feature Implementation Prompt

Use this template when requesting implementation of a new feature.

## Feature Summary
Describe the feature in 2-4 sentences.

## Constraints

## Execution Request
Implement this feature in phased order.
For each phase, include:
- files expected to change
- key risks
- validation steps
- completion signal before moving to the next phase
